ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., SD, CA) */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* 2020 population of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the United States where the state is located (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the region where the state is located (e.g., New England, Midwest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which population estimates are available */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a census year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., M12, M11) */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the estimate belongs */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year to which the estimate belongs */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period to which the estimate belongs */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Population estimate value */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the estimate */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population estimate being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision (e.g., revised population controls, model reestimation) */,
  "revised_value" INTEGER /* Revised population estimate value */,
  "revised_margin_of_error" REAL /* Revised margin of error for the estimate */,
  "revised_confidence_interval" REAL /* Revised confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES population_estimates ("estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footnotes" (
  "footnote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footnote */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population estimate to which the footnote belongs */,
  "footnote_text" TEXT /* Text of the footnote */,
  "footnote_type" TEXT /* Type of footnote (e.g., data quality, methodology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footnote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_footnotes_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES population_estimates ("estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population estimate being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the estimate */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES population_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimate_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population estimate to which the metadata belongs */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata (e.g., data quality, methodology) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimate_metadata_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES population_estimates ("estimate_id")
)
